bullets: Dirty flash and local update works!
New Desktop Mode and pill hideable
Please read release notes very carefully

features: New Desktop Mode and pill hideable in settings/display
regressions: New Desktop Mode will spawn some desktops without you creating them, occasionally. Just ignore and "clear all" in recents every now and then.
Custom statusbar icon sets as of now are included, but not functional.
